message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for scope watchdog coverage gaps

Cover orphan detection (parent force-closed with live children), zombie
finalizer threshold, stale Created detection, excessive depth detection,
scope leak severity escalation (Warning vs Critical), scan count/total_alerts
accumulation, deadlock detection disable flag, WatchdogAlert/AlertKind/
AlertSeverity/ScanSummary serde roundtrips, has_errors accuracy,
unconfigured tier limit fallback, grace period default fallback, and
canonical string mutation after scan. 7→29 total tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
